events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "staged",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Conductor is undersized for the load and circuit length, causing excessive voltage drop.",
    "Staged conductor does not meet NEC 310 ampacity and voltage-drop recommendations."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace staged conductor with a larger size that satisfies ampacity after derating and limits voltage drop to 3% for branch circuits or 5% total per NEC 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4.",
    "Verify new conductor size using Table 310.16 and voltage-drop calculations before proceeding."
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged conductor is undersized for the connected load and circuit length, which would result in excessive voltage drop and potential overheating. This violates NEC 310.15 ampacity requirements and the voltage-drop guidance in 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4. The work cannot proceed with the current material; it must be replaced with a correctly sized conductor.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310.15",
    "Table 310.16",
    "NEC 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4"
  ]
}
